fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item that is registered in the Service Item table.

fields.name: Serv. Price Adjmt. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price adjustment group that applies to the posted service line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of this line, which can be item, resource, cost, or general ledger Account.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service item, resource, or service cost, of which the price is going to be adjusted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the service line that will be adjusted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total net amount on the service line.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: New Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit price of the item, resource, or cost specified on the service line.

fields.name: Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage you want to provide on the amount on the corresponding service line.

fields.name: Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount you want to provide on the amount on this service line.

fields.name: Amount incl. VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount that the service line is going to be adjusted, including VAT.

fields.name: New Amount incl. VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies a new amount, including VAT.

fields.name: Adjustment Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the adjustment type for this line.

fields.name: Service Price Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service price adjustment group associated with the service item on this line.
